resources.string: Visit the GitHub Repository for more information.
AI Model created with <a href="https://teachablemachine.withgoogle.com/train/image">TensorFlowLite Open Source Library.
Datasets labelled with <a href="https://ml.azure.com/">Azure AI Machine Learning Studio.
AI YOLO Model created and trained using ultralytics python library in <a href="https://colab.research.google.com/">Google Colab.
